SCRIPT.Value:
[{"seedId":"200","endNodeId":"","genericDelayJumpTime":"240","genericDelayJumpNode":"node_0","genericRedisplayTime":"120","genericRedisplayMessage":"","dataContextExpirationTime":"","engineVersion":4,"allowUsingAI":false,"importMismatches":[],"assistantId":"","consts":[],"currentPersona":{"personaType":"Guided","role":"Support Agent","industry":"Automotive","companyName":"Shlomo Group","tone":"Friendly","humor":"None","responseLanguage":"Automatic","length":"Balanced","emojis":"None","listType":"None","headers":false,"boldText":false,"link":false},"instructions":null},{"id":"node_0","text":"Start","parent":"#","addChannelStateMessage":false},{"id":"n_1","text":"תפריט ראשי","parent":"node_0","bodyHtml":"

ברוכים הבאים לצ'אט של קבוצת שלמה,
במה מתעניינים?

","buttonDisplayMode":"1","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_2","text":"לקוחות חדשים","parent":"n_1","condition":"{\"StreamAvailabilityConditions\":[],\"ContextConditions\":[],\"CodeCondition\":\"var m = {{object.message}};\\nif(m == \\\"לקוחות חדשים\\\"){\\n return true;\\n}\\nreturn false;\"}","bodyHtml":"

תבחרו מה מתאים לכם ונמשיך משם

","end":"2","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_3","text":"שרות ללקוחות קיימים","parent":"n_1","condition":"{\"StreamAvailabilityConditions\":[],\"ContextConditions\":[],\"CodeCondition\":\"var m = {{object.message}};\\nif(m == \\\"שרות ללקוחות קיימים\\\"){\\n return true;\\n}\\nreturn false;\"}","bodyHtml":"

באפשרותכם לפנות אלינו בימים א' - ה' בין השעות 8:00 עד 17:00 ובימי ו' בין השעות 8:00 עד 12:00 ל *6670
או במייל
NK-MokedNamer@Shlomo.co.il

","end":"2","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}}]
SCRIPT.Name: Shlomo Main Menu
